rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one claim by suggesting further research to verify the 'first' claim.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content but has one minor regression in the form of unsupported leaps from local measurements to general conclusions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
